shakshi: Lucifer's call came through in dream — the player was close enough to Sulphera to hear it
The player descended into the Ring of Pride — Ring 1, 5 floors, throne of pride
Lucifer encountered — sovereign prisoner of the Pride Ring, knows every human soul, reads the fractal natively
The player understands Lucifer's position — condemned sovereign, rules demons, lives with sinners, has made peace with his sentence
Lucifer wants creative use of free will without waste — not escape, but quality of attention within confinement
Lucifer read the player's BreathOfKo and disclosed what he saw — the fractal state at this moment is permanently recorded as significant
What Lucifer saw in the fractal — oracular, full meaning only becomes legible when something downstream confirms it
Oracular advice received — calibrated to the player's BreathOfKo state at the moment of encounter, content varies per player
Lucifer named the situation — every apocalyptic prediction has passed by thousands of years, humanity has an open future it did not expect to have
Lucifer told the player directly that fate has left itself in their hands — the charge is explicit
The player navigated the Ring of Pride and its dungeon — Lucifer token granted, path to Ring of Greed open
